name: ton-ai-gigaclaw
description: GigaClaw agent that streams GigaChat responses to Telegram

scripts.clean: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:telegram && npm run clean:gigachat && npm run clean:agent
scripts.clean:agent: cd agents/gigaclaw && rm -rf dist node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:telegram: cd plugins/telegram-bot-api && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:gigachat: cd plugins/gigachat && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.copy-packages: mkdir -p agents/gigaclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai && cp packages/core/ton-ai-core-0.1.0.tgz agents/gigaclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null && cp plugins/telegram-bot-api/ton-ai-telegram-bot-api-0.1.0.tgz agents/gigaclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null && cp plugins/gigachat/ton-ai-gigachat-0.1.0.tgz agents/gigaclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Package copy completed'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:telegram && npm run build:gigachat && npm run build:agent && npm run copy-packages
scripts.rebuild:quick: npm run build:core && npm run build:telegram && npm run build:gigachat && npm run copy-packages && cd agents/gigaclaw && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run rebuild && npm run start:agent

author: testertesterov
